headline: Convenient parking for Pine Plaza visitors.
intro: Pine Plaza offers four levels of structured underground parking, a major convenience in the heart of Palisades Park.
introKorean: 파인 플라자는 팰리세이즈파크 중심에서 편리한 4개 층의 지하 주차장을 제공합니다.

shopperParking.title: Shopper Parking
shopperParking.description: Pine Plaza shoppers may check in for up to two hours of parking while visiting tenants.
shopperParking.descriptionKorean: 파인 플라자 방문 고객은 입점 업체 이용 시 최대 2시간 주차 확인이 가능합니다.

monthlyParking.title: Monthly Parking
monthlyParking.description: Monthly parking may be available. Contact management for current availability and rates.
monthlyParking.descriptionKorean: 월 정기 주차는 가능 여부 및 요금 확인을 위해 관리사무소에 문의해 주세요.

rules: Parking rules, validation requirements, and rates are subject to change.
Vehicles must follow posted property rules and signage.
Individual tenant parking policies may vary.
